title: sparganium ramosum subsp. neglectum
intro: Sparganium ramosum subsp. neglectum, also known as Bur-reed or False Bur-reed, is a perennial aquatic plant that belongs to the family Sparganiaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant's rhizomes and leaves have been used in herbal preparations to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Sparganium ramosum subsp. neglectum can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support overall health and well-being.
